name: login submission coordinator veeva
output: Navigate to '<<vault_url>>'.

name: enter username submission coordinator veeva
output: Enter '<<submission_cooridinator>>' in the User Name input field.

name: click continue button veeva
output: Click the Continue button.

name: enter password veeva
output: Enter '<<password>>' in the Password input field.

name: click login button veeva
output: Click the Log In button.

name: verify submission coordinator logged in veeva
output: Verify that the '<<submission_cooridinator>>' user is logged in successfully.

name: switch user submission coordinator veeva
output: Click on Switch User.

name: select regulatory submissions tab veeva
output: Select Regulatory Submissions from the Tab Collections dropdown.

name: click applications tab veeva
output: Click on the Applications tab.

name: select applicants dropdown veeva
output: Select Applicants from the Applications dropdown.

name: verify applicants tab visible veeva
output: Verify that the Applicants view is visible.

name: verify all applications view veeva
output: Verify that the All Applications view is selected.

name: click create application button veeva
output: Click the +Create button.

name: verify create application page veeva
output: Verify that the Create Applications page is displayed.

name: enter application name veeva
output: Enter a value in the Name field.

name: select primary product veeva
output: Select a value from the Primary Product dropdown.

name: select applicant veeva
output: Select a value from the Applicant dropdown.

name: select application type veeva
output: Select a value from the Application Type dropdown.

name: select center veeva
output: Select a value from the Center dropdown.

name: select country veeva
output: Select a value from the Country dropdown.

name: enter application number veeva
output: Enter the Application Number.

name: save application veeva
output: Click the Save button.

name: verify application record displayed veeva
output: Verify that the Application record is displayed.

name: edit application record veeva
output: Click the Edit (pencil) icon to edit the Application record.

name: enter description veeva
output: Enter a value in the Description field.

name: enter cber bla supplement number veeva
output: Enter a value in the CBER BLA Supplement Number field.

name: enter fda reviewer veeva
output: Enter a value in the FDA Reviewer field.

name: create applicant name veeva
output: Type '<<applicant_name>>' in the Name input field.

name: enter applicant address veeva
output: Enter address details in the Address fields.

name: enter applicant city veeva
output: Enter city in the City input field.

name: enter applicant state veeva
output: Enter state in the State/Province/Region input field.

name: enter applicant country veeva
output: Enter country in the Country input field.

name: enter applicant zip veeva
output: Enter '<<zip_no>>' in the ZIP input field.

name: save applicant veeva
output: Click the Save button in the Create Applicant dialog.

name: verify applicant record veeva
output: Verify that the Applicant record is displayed.
